Notes: Lexi Bruno becomes fourth player in GBC history to score 500 pts in 1 season.
Mikila Stefanski ties school record with her 65th three-pointer this season.
Game.Officials: Kerri Homan,  Reginald Fowler,  Edwin Guzman
